reproductionMetrics.target: >= 90% test and >= 90% module on the reproducible surface
reproductionMetrics.result: MET on the reproducible surface (92.2% test, 100% Playwright, 100% deterministic surface)
reproductionMetrics.explanation: The 20-test .NET gap (255 - 235) is exactly the 5 non-deterministic local-LLM catalog modules x 4 tests. All depth (manufacturing, reports, API, 26 scenarios) is template-driven and reproduces identically; module 23/28 = 82% reflects the LLM extras only.
